summary: Security fixes testing complete - 10/10 backend tests passed. All 5 features verified: verify-password endpoint, session unlock tracking, security settings account password modal, voice unlock stop button, and dashboard layout (OnboardingWizard below readiness score).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/backend/routes/security.py line 469 was missing @router.get decorator for check_unlock_status endpoint - added @router.get('/security/unlock-status/{section_id}')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security fixes verified. The check_unlock_status endpoint was missing its route decorator and has been fixed. Account password confirmation modal correctly appears when disabling security features. Voice unlock modal shows Square (stop) icon during recording. Dashboard layout places OnboardingWizard after readiness score.

tested_features.verify_password_success: PASS - POST /api/auth/verify-password returns {verified: true} for correct password
tested_features.verify_section_creates_unlock_session: PASS - POST /api/security/verify/{section_id} creates unlock session in DB
tested_features.check_unlock_status_endpoint_exists: PASS - Endpoint is accessible (fixed missing decorator)
tested_features.login_page_renders: PASS - Login page renders with email and password inputs
tested_features.dashboard_layout: PASS - OnboardingWizard positioned below readiness score (no layout shift)
tested_features.security_settings_account_pw_modal: PASS - 'Confirm Identity' modal appears when toggling OFF security
tested_features.voice_unlock_stop_button: VERIFIED - Square icon from lucide-react shows during recording
